feed.description: Recurring guests from other shows revisit their positions.
feed.title: Cross-Show

bullets: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about labor markets, and I'm joined by Skanda Amarnath, returning macro economist. Skanda Amarnath, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Skanda Eminas was on episode 2 making this same point on Bloomberg-data caveats.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about labor markets, and I'm joined by Skanda Amarnath, returning macro economist. Skanda Amarnath, thanks for being here.
summary.title: When the Severe Garble Bites
